fault_hypothesis: The code incorrectly removes a valid duplicate element on line 84. This happens when both input streams end with the same value, due to a faulty condition on line 83.

constraints.intent: After the incorrect pop operation, the total number of elements in the merged list is wrong.

spec.expr: not (merged__1 and left__1 and right__1 and merged__1[-1] == left__1[-1] == right__1[-1])

constraints.intent: The condition that triggers the removal of the last element should never be true.
The branch that removes a valid duplicate final element should never be executed.
